description_long: This is an articulated desk lamp with a conical pink shade, supported by a two-segmented, jointed arm in a reddish-brown color. The lamp features metallic spherical joints at each articulation point, allowing for flexible adjustment of the arm and head. The base is wide, octagonal, and blue, providing stability and a modern geometric touch. The lamp head has a blue rim and a visible white bulb, with small circular vent holes along the upper part of the shade for heat dissipation. The overall design is functional yet stylish, suitable for workspaces or study areas in urban environments.
description: A modern articulated desk lamp with a conical pink shade, blue geometric base, and metallic joints, featuring a visible white bulb.
description_view_0: The lamp is shown at a three-quarter angle, highlighting the conical pink shade, blue rim, white bulb, and the articulated reddish-brown arm with metallic joints.
description_view_1: A side profile view emphasizes the straight alignment of the arm segments and the octagonal blue base, with the lamp head facing left.
description_view_2: A top-down perspective reveals the circular opening of the lamp shade and the full articulation of the arm, as well as the geometric shape of the base.
description_view_3: A frontal view displays the lamp head and bulb directly, with the arm and base mostly aligned behind the shade.
